findings.issue: loadWinState() silently catches all errors including missing STATE_FILE on first run, making it impossible to debug actual read failures
findings.suggestion: Check if STATE_FILE exists before reading, or log errors to distinguish missing file from corruption
findings.est_impact: Hard to diagnose user issues; malformed state silently becomes empty object

findings.issue: saveWinState() swallows all exceptions without logging, hiding permission errors or disk space issues
findings.suggestion: Log caught errors or use optional chaining to detect specific failure modes
findings.est_impact: Window state may not persist without user awareness

findings.issue: webPreferences with nodeIntegration, contextIsolation false, and webSecurity false is a critical security vulnerability
findings.suggestion: Set nodeIntegration: false, contextIsolation: true, webSecurity: true; use preload script instead for IPC
findings.est_impact: Renderer process has unrestricted access to Node.js APIs; arbitrary code in chat.html can access filesystem/execute commands

findings.issue: saveWinState(win) is called twice in event handlers—once per resize/move, and again on close
findings.suggestion: Debounce resize/move events or consolidate into single handler to reduce I/O
findings.est_impact: Excessive file writes during window dragging; minor performance/disk wear
